goal: Tighten ResponseAPI and batch promotion boundaries around explicit contract and evidence rules.
successCriteria: ResponseAPI helper surface has documented promotion candidates and deferred gaps.
Batch lifecycle helpers and maturity claims are tied to explicit verification evidence.
Undocumented helper defaults are either encoded in tests or deferred out of the package.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding new provider families or broad new cloud surfaces.
Changing README default storytelling before evidence is ready.
